1844310.name: AbyssMemory Demo
1844310.description:
Worldwide Drawing Adventure Challenge
Byking, the developer of numerous action titles, now sends out its newest challenge to fans all over the world.

※This demo version will allow you to experience the world of Abyss Memory with some limited functionality.

The world of Abyss Memory:

In a world amongst the heavens,
A curious, little angel named Mariel spent all her days reading through the vast collection of books in the grand library.
One day, while browsing the library’s collection, she came across a very peculiar book with naught but the title, “Abyss” printed on its cover. The pages within were blank.
In truth, Mariel had heard the name, “Abyss” from the elder angels before. It was the name of the world below the heavens.
Intrigued by the notion, her curiosity grew until she couldn’t resist any longer. She ventured out to the heavenly bridge to sneak a peek over the edge, into the world known as “Abyss.”
However, when she peered down into the depths…


Meet the challenge with intuitive drawing action!
The basic controls are simply “click” and “draw.”
Protect, connect, aid, and guide Mariel with your mouse.
Mariel will continue to walk in a single direction. Draw paths with your mouse and aid Mariel on her adventure through the Abyss.
Worldwide Drawing Adventure Challenge
Byking, the developer of numerous action titles, now sends out its newest challenge to fans all over the world.
Strive forward with easy-to-learn controls. Drawing action!
Meet the drawing action challenge with intuitive controls.
Protect, connect, aid, and guide with your mouse.
Mariel will continue to walk in a single direction. Draw paths with your mouse and aid Mariel on her adventure through the Abyss.

英语, 日语*
